name: marigold-http
status: LIVE as of the quick-start door ship (2026-07-06). Shapes verified against apps/web/app/api/quick/route.ts and app/api/docs/[id]/content/route.ts: create returns {docId, slug, url, editKey, claimUrl, expiresAt}; read/update auth via X-Marigold-Key (or ?k=); no If-Match support (conditional stays null); comments remain web/MCP-only (FEEDBACK skips).
notes: Placeholder for Marigold's planned anonymous HTTP quick-start API — the scripted counterpart to targets/marigold-mcp.json.
Planned: POST /api/quick -> {docId, url, editKey}; editKey is the full capability for the anonymous doc.
Planned: GET/PUT /api/docs/:id/content authenticated with the X-Marigold-Key header.
Planned: POST /api/docs/:id/claim to attach an anonymous doc to an account later.
Comment endpoints below are speculative (comments are web/MCP-only today); the runner skips FEEDBACK when they are null.
Conditional-update semantics (ETag/If-Match) TBD — 'conditional' is null until decided; add {"type": "if-match"} if the shipped API supports it.
When this ships, benchmark it against results/2026-07-05-smde-baseline.json — same phases, same fixtures — to validate the quick-start latency work.

claim.notes: Not part of the benchmark phases; recorded here so the descriptor documents the full planned surface.
